description: Two LLM iterations modeling the type-mismatch end of the Mend loop. Iteration 0 returns the Map.get result directly (the modal Python idiom), producing E0200 'expected String, found Option<String>'. Iteration 1 wraps the lookup in a match. No machine-applicable fixes — convergence is purely descriptive.

responses.note: LLM's first attempt — returns users.get(user_id) directly as the function's tail. E0200 fires from typecheck because Map.get returns Option<String>, not String.
After receiving the type-mismatch diagnostic, the LLM wraps the lookup in a match with a None-arm fallback. Build clean.
